title: Enhanced Workbenches
description: Better crafting solutions through the ages brought onto Modern Minecraft.
body:
This mod is part of the RED LOGIC series.
Logicates • Enhanced Workbenches


**Enhanced Workbenches** adds two improved Crafting Tables, capable of storing the items inside them: • **Project Table:** Has additional two rows to store items, assisting you through all your microcrafting adventures; • **Crafting Station:** Budget, yet enhanced; capable of storing items the items inside permanently. **Features** - Featuring RedPower 2's Project Table; - Featuring TiC's Crafting Station; - Items shown in-world, fully configurable; - Full [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi/) integration; - Full [Roughly Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) integration; - Full [Crafting Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/crafting-tweaks/) integration. **Discord**
